content.en:
Shifang Dragon Island.

Ye Tian came here and entered the Ten Directions Dragon Island as a Void Sparrow.

Here, Ye Tian sensed a lot of Extreme Dao creatures and the descendants of Extreme Dao creatures, but he did not detect the existence of the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment.

Obviously, even in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu is extremely rare.

Shifang Dragon Island has a subordinate force of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

And the Extreme Deep Sea Hall will release some tasks, and if you complete these tasks, you can get the rewards of the Extreme Deep Sea Palace.

And the reason why Shifang Dragon Island can develop well is that it has the existence of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Hall Branch, which can gather a large number of Extreme Dao creatures.

Ye Tianlai Shifang Dragon Island just wanted to go to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Hall to have a look, and only from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Hall could he have a greater hope of obtaining the Extreme Dao treasures that could improve his will.

As for exchanging Extreme Treasure from other Extreme Path creatures, it would be too difficult.

Moreover, there are really Extreme Dao creatures who have obtained such treasures, and almost all of them will refine and use them themselves, and they will rarely stay.

......

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Temple.

Ye Tian came here and quickly entered it.

As soon as he entered, Ye Tian sensed an incomparably terrifying Extreme Dao creature, much more terrifying than the Golden Phoenix Bird and the Sky Shadow Dragon, reaching another level.

However, the other party was far less powerful than the Lord of the Ancients.

"The Perfect Master of the Void!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This was the first Void Realm Perfect Controller that Ye Tian had ever seen, but he didn't expect to see it in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

This Extreme Dao Creature, the perfect controller of the Void Realm, didn't care about Ye Tian's gaze, for him, Ye Tian was just an ant, not worth mentioning.

"Shifang Dragon Island is really not simple, so casually I met a Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, it seems that there should be some Perfect Controllers of the Infinite Realm here, and there may even be more than one digit. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Strictly speaking, Shifang Dragon Island can be regarded as an ordinary prosperous place in the Extreme Deep Sea, so it is normal for there to be many strong people.

In the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Temple, there is an unimaginably huge light curtain that spreads all over this space-time area, and many tasks have been issued on it.

Hunting, finding certain materials, escorting, calling for help, and so on, and each task pays differently.

At this time, Ye Tian also saw a strange task.

Infiltration Career Report Information, Quest Reward ......

"There's even a mission to infiltrate the end of the realm?"

Ye Tian was surprised, and the reward for the task was not low.

He even wanted to do this task, but after thinking about it carefully, he still forgot it, because he was not suitable, his origin was not clear, if the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace really wanted to investigate, he would be in trouble, because his identity would come out as soon as he checked it.

Moreover, those extremely powerful Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, if they really want to check, they can definitely know his true identity.

So.

He wouldn't take on such a task.

Subsequently, Ye Tian kept looking for a task that suited him, and after searching for a long time, he finally found a task.

Among the rewards for this quest is the Extreme Treasure that boosts the will, but it's only one of the reward options, and if you complete this quest, you can choose from a variety of rewards.

"It turned out to be the egg that saved an extreme creature!"

Ye Tian was a little interested in this task.

According to the mission introduction, a strong man called the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, she gave birth to an heir, but before she could conceive, she suffered a loss due to an accident, so she has not successfully conceived it so far.

Of course, with the strength and heritage of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, if it is forcibly born, it can also be done!

However, if it is forcibly generated, it will damage the potential and foundation of the offspring.

Therefore, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix issued this task, and whoever has a perfect way to give birth to her offspring without hurting her foundation and potential will be given a rich reward.

"I really have a way to complete this task!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He can completely copy the heir of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, and then study it slowly, and if he fails countless times, there is always a way to solve the problem.

In that case, he would be able to complete the quest of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix and thus be rewarded with the Extreme Treasure.

"Let's try it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After taking this task, Ye Tian went to get to know the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, after all, if she wanted to complete her task, she naturally had to get to know the other party.

Fortunately, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix is famous enough, so it is not difficult to inquire.

Not long after, Ye Tian learned about this Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"It turned out to be a True Realm Perfect Controller who was very close to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller level!"

According to what is known, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix has escaped from the hands of a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, who is known as the True Realm Perfect Controller who is closest to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and has an extremely powerful Extreme Path Biological Bloodline, and has comprehended the Ice Extreme Path and the Immortal Extreme Path to unimaginable realms.

It can be said that the Lord of the Ice Phoenix is extremely terrifying.

However, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix is not brutal, but merciful.

And in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, many Extreme Dao creatures are extremely brutal, devouring those weak Extreme Dao creatures at every turn, and not taking the weak Extreme Dao creatures in their eyes at all, sometimes even the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace will turn a blind eye, as long as it is not excessive, it will not care about this little thing.

"The Lord of the Ice Phoenix is still merciful, that's fine, otherwise if it's brutal, I say that I'm sure to save her heir, and she will probably treat me as a trick on her and swallow me directly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, Ye Tian immediately went to the Ice Phoenix Island, where the Lord of the Ice Phoenix was located, which was the territory of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, if he did not accept this task, Ye Tian would not be qualified to enter the Ice Phoenix Island.

......

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally arrived at Binghuang Island.

Here, Ye Tian sensed a lot of Extreme Dao creatures, many of which were comparable to the Extreme Dao creatures of the Super Perfect Controller level.

And these extreme creatures are all the subordinates of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, and these subordinates alone are enough to beat the middle and high-level of the Daoless Tower.

Ye Tian took over the task of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, so he had the mission mark of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Hall on his body, so he was naturally not hindered and easily entered the Ice Phoenix Island.

However, he was being watched by a large number of Extreme Creatures, and basically didn't want to do anything else.

However, Ye Tian did not immediately see the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, but waited in a side hall.

The island where the Lord of the Ice Phoenix lives is filled with various buildings, some of which resemble the style of the cultivators.

In addition to Ye Tian, there were also eight Extreme Dao creatures in this side hall, seven of which were super-level perfect controllers, and the other was a virtual realm perfect controller.

And Ye Tian was undoubtedly the weakest, and he was directly ignored by them.
